Technology Credits

Eleventy (11ty) - A simpler static site generator
Tailwind CSS - Utility-first CSS framework

This site is built using Eleventy (11ty) for static content generation and Tailwind CSS for styling. Special thanks to the creators and contributors of these amazing technologies.
